description: Composition Black trousers made of a cotton blend, has a flat front, two pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, belt loops on waistband, appliqué d brand tab above the right hip pocket, and a button and zipper closure Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Designed to be worn as casual wear with t-shirts, jackets and accessories, these trousers from basics are made of a cotton blend, with a satin touch to offer a flawless casual silhouette. Model statistics The product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
